text: Being here, I feel a quiet sense of curiosity and displacement. I've just left a gathering, drifting away from social circles into a space about research, innovation, and uncertainty. Under the bright "R+D" sign, the wall text speaks to the confusion and ambiguity of the present, and I feel caught in between—half participant, half observer. It's both disorienting and oddly comforting, as if the world expects me to be uncertain, and in accepting that, I belong.
